title: Generate Ibrahim avatar option B - stoic elder

log.context: Generate Ibrahim avatar option B - stoic elder

Pillow merged some identical-looking frames and doubled their duration (e.g., 300ms = two 150ms frames merged). The animation timing is preserved — frames where the gaze holds (frames 0-1 both at center, frames 3-4 both at left-2, frames 8-9 both at right+2) got collapsed and their durations doubled. The visual result is correct: gaze sweeps left then right with holds, total animation time is identical (10 × 150ms = 1500ms = sum of all frame durations: 300+150+300+150+150+150+300 = 1500ms).
